contexts.context: ...expence of the operation: fifty guineas, replied <mark>Granjean</mark>.—M. de C. remonstrated grievously against the charge,...
...a bargain, to lower the price: but <mark>Granjean</mark> was inflexible; and M. de C. had nothing...
...his sight was perfectly restored. Come then, said <mark>Granjean</mark>, let us proceed to the other eye....
